name: atmosfer-weather-dashboard
description: A fast, full-stack weather dashboard with a backend proxy, response caching, and a UI whose sky changes to match the forecast.

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,magenta "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.test: npm --prefix server test && npm --prefix client test
